nodes.label: OpenBench (PhoneFix Admin)
nodes.rationale: Single-user admin tool to replace complex multi-role workflows and external tracking boards with a unified dashboard

nodes.label: Product Requirements Document
nodes.rationale: PRD defines scope requirements for phone repair admin system replacing manual Google Sheet workflow

nodes.label: Repository Guidelines
nodes.rationale: Structured rules for project navigation, build commands, testing, commits, and deployment strategy

nodes.label: Repair Status Workflow
nodes.rationale: Four linear stages track device lifecycle from drop-off through pickup, with automatic payment and warranty calculations at pickup

nodes.label: Tickets Table Data Model
nodes.rationale: Single-table design for maximum query simplicity in a single-user context

nodes.label: Admin/Owner Role
nodes.rationale: Authentication and multi-user roles removed to simplify local management; single Admin/Owner has full access

nodes.label: Cancel/Delete Flow
nodes.rationale: Cancelled removed through ticket deletion rather than a separate status; future retained cancellations may store closure metadata separately from the four-status lifecycle

nodes.label: Backend Layered Architecture
nodes.rationale: Strict layer separation: handlers parse HTTP, services enforce business rules, repositories perform SQL queries

nodes.label: Mockery Mocks
nodes.rationale: Generated Mockery mocks in apps/backend/mocks for repository interface testing

nodes.label: Graphify Knowledge Graph
nodes.rationale: Knowledge graph at graphify-out/ for cross-module queries; update with graphify update . after code changes

nodes.label: Testcontainers/PostgreSQL
nodes.rationale: Integration tests use Testcontainers/PostgreSQL; run before merging database or handler changes

nodes.label: Idempotency System
nodes.rationale: X-Idempotency-Key header on POST/PATCH mutations prevents duplicate submissions; key regenerated on form reopen

nodes.label: Loading States & Button Disable
nodes.rationale: Submit/cancel buttons disabled during in-flight requests with spinner text to prevent double-click

nodes.label: Copy Writing Skill
nodes.rationale: Clear, concise, user-centric copy; avoid marketing fluff, passive voice, and system jargon

nodes.label: Git Commit Skill
nodes.rationale: Standardized Conventional Commits workflow; never use git add . or git commit -a

nodes.label: RTK (Rust Token Killer)
nodes.rationale: Prefix shell commands with rtk to filter and compress command output, saving 60-90% on LLM token consumption

nodes.label: Status: picked_up
nodes.rationale: This is the payment moment: exit_date recorded, payment set to paid, warranty_expiry_date automatically calculated

nodes.label: Idempotency Keys Table Missing
nodes.rationale: Initial POST /api/v1/tickets failed with 500 because idempotency_keys table did not exist in compose test database

nodes.label: Single-Instance Deployment
nodes.rationale: Production assumes single-instance model with scheduled downtime for migrations

nodes.label: Expand/Contract Migration Strategy
nodes.rationale: Schema migrations that drop columns require downtime window or expand/contract rollout to be rolling-compatible
